'''Quella''' was a [[Color/Legends|pale]], slender [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] with brown hair. A [[Scoundrel/Legends|thief]] like her partner [[Ah Kwan]], the pair used [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] as a hideout in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
